_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: tshock
author: parker@parkervcp.com
description:
t-shock導入済みTerrariaサーバーです。

https://tshock.co/

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Vanilla tModloader Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
## install packages to get version and download links
apt update
apt install -y curl wget jq file unzip

## get release info and download links
LATEST_JSON=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/Pryaxis/TShock/releases/latest")
RELEASES=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/Pryaxis/TShock/releases")
MATCH=$([[ "$(uname -m)" == "x86_64" ]] && echo "(linux-x64|linux-amd64)" || echo "linux-arm64")

echo "${MATCH}"

if [ -z "$TSHOCK_VERSION" ] || [ "$TSHOCK_VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
    DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $LATEST_JSON | jq .assets | jq -r .[].browser_download_url | grep -i -E "${MATCH}" | head -1 )
else
    VERSION_CHECK=$(echo $RELEASES | jq -r --arg VERSION "$TSHOCK_VERSION" '.[] | select(.tag_name==$VERSION) | .tag_name')
    if [ "$TSHOCK_VERSION" == "$VERSION_CHECK" ]; then
        DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $RELEASES | jq -r --arg VERSION "$TSHOCK_VERSION" '.[] | select(.tag_name==$VERSION) | .assets[].browser_download_url' |  grep -i -E "${MATCH}" | head -1 )
    else
        echo -e "defaulting to latest release"
        DOWNLOAD_LINK=$(echo $LATEST_JSON | jq .assets | jq -r .[].browser_download_url | grep -i -E "${MATCH}" | head -1)
    fi
fi

## mkdir and cd to /mnt/server/
mkdir -p /mnt/server

cd /mnt/server

## download release
echo -e "running: wget $DOWNLOAD_LINK"
wget $DOWNLOAD_LINK -O TShock.zip

unzip -o TShock.zip

tar xvf TShock-*.tar

rm TShock.zip TShock-*.tar

chmod +x TShock.Server

echo -e "install complete"
